# Notion: Notas, tareas e IA · Productivity

Generated: Jul 20, 2026, 10:27 PM

## **Contents** {#toc}

- [Bugs and stability](#theme-bugs_stability)
- [Feature requests](#theme-feature_requests)


## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      19 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: May 6, 2026 - Jul 18, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _J A_, Jul 18, 2026, 1/5: "Unsuable. Copying note from Windows app to Word 1) loses all formatting, inserting weird symbols instead 2) inserts all text as list items. Also bugs 1. if there are no pages inside, expand icon should not be shown 2. removing text from beginning of the page should not switch to page header and remove that text as well. And a bunch of bugs in Windows app"
            2. _Stefano Polese_, May 6, 2026, 1/5: "Notion Is Amazing, the app is terrible. Random bugs pop up constantly, I couldn't access my teamspace for weeks, then it erases part of what I'm writing while I'm writing it and sometimes it doesn't load any page, absurd."
            3. _Moesha Njoroge_, May 31, 2026, 2/5: "App used to be good, even though you have to switch to browser for some things. But it just keeps getting worse - crashing, lagging, not uploading pictures correctly. It's obvious that they don't care about their mobile users, no matter if you use the app or browser."

## **Feature requests** {#theme-feature_requests}

   **Feature requests.**
      3 recent review(s) mention feature requests.
      Review window: Jul 18, 2026 - Jul 18, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users are asking for missing capabilities. This can reveal roadmap opportunities.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _brah why you do this_, Jul 18, 2026, 2/5: "I like the app, but i really wish i could disable all the ai features, I don't want to even see them. it's super annoying."
